name: Coronary Heart Disease
definition: Abbreviation for coronary atherosclerotic heart disease
etiology: Coronary atherosclerosis leads to lumen narrowing
symptoms: Chest pain, chest tightness, palpitations, shortness of breath
treatment_principles: Improve myocardial blood supply, control risk factors, drug therapy or interventional therapy
prevention_advice: Control blood lipids and pressure, quit smoking, balanced diet, moderate exercise
